raw:
## Completed
Implemented hybrid Enter behavior for `AskUserQuestion`:
- Enter on option list advances to next question unless already on last.
- Enter on last question submits all answers.
- Enter in note fields now commits/cycles focus instead of submitting.
- Updated hint text and logic tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - wired hybrid Enter behavior and updated hint text.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - added exported pure `decideOptionListEnterAction`.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - added unit coverage for advance/submit decision and explicit theme.bg guard pass output.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally.
